SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccountSettingsActivity
AccountSettingsActivity.java Screen for users to update their profile information.
AdminHomeActivity
 
AttendeeAdapter
AttendeeAdapter.java RecyclerView adapter for organizer attendee management.
AttendeeAdapter.OnSelectionChangedListener
 
AuthCallback
 
AuthRepository
 
BuyTicketActivity
BuyTicketActivity.java Allows the user to choose ticket tiers and proceed to checkout.
CampusEventDiscoveryApp
Applies persisted UI preferences before any screen is shown.
CheckoutActivity
CheckoutActivity.java Collects attendee payment information, processes a demo payment via MockPaymentService, creates an RSVP with a QR payload, and navigates to TicketActivity.
CreateEventActivity
CreateEventActivity.java Organizer event proposal form that writes a pending proposal to Firestore.
DevBypassHelper
Shared helper for launching the developer bypass role picker.
DevSessionManager
Stores a local-only developer bypass session used when no Firebase user is signed in.
Event
Event.java Model class representing an approved and active event in Firestore.
EventAdapter
EventAdapter.java RecyclerView adapter used to render standard event cards from Firestore data.
EventAdapter.EventViewHolder
 
EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
 
EventApprovalActivity
EventApprovalActivity.java Detailed administrative review page for inspecting and approving/rejecting submitted events.
EventAttendee
EventAttendee.java Model class representing an attendee document under events/{eventId}/attendees/{userId}.
EventCalendarFragment
EventCalendarFragment.java Calendar screen showing RSVP'd events for personal scheduling.
EventDetailActivity
EventDetailActivity.java Shows full event details for a selected event.
EventFeedbackActivity
Lets attendees submit ratings, reviews, and optional photos for events.
EventProposal
EventProposal.java Model class representing a proposal document from the event_proposals collection in Firestore.
EventRepository
EventRepository.java Repository class responsible for all Firestore operations.
EventRepository.ActionCallback
 
EventRepository.AttendeeListCallback
 
EventRepository.BooleanCallback
 
EventRepository.EventListCallback
 
EventRepository.FeaturedEventIdsCallback
 
EventRepository.MemoryListCallback
 
EventRepository.NotificationListCallback
 
EventRepository.ProposalCallback
 
EventRepository.ProposalListCallback
 
EventRepository.SingleEventCallback
 
EventRepository.StringCallback
 
EventRepository.UserCallback
 
EventValidator
EventValidator.java Utility class to validate event proposal data before submission.
FavouritesFragment
FavouritesFragment.java Displays the current user's saved events from Firestore.
FirebaseAuthRepository
 
FirestoreCallback
FirestoreCallback.java Generic callback interface for Firestore operations.
HomeAdminFragment
HomeAdminFragment.java Administrator dashboard for reviewing and approving event proposals.
HomeFragment
HomeFragment.java Student home screen showing featured events and personalized event recommendations.
HomeOrganizerFragment
HomeOrganizerFragment.java Organizer home screen showing featured events, personalized recommendations, and a quick access button to create a new event.
MainActivity
MainActivity.java Main host activity containing the bottom navigation bar and fragment container.
MaintenanceActivity
Simple screen shown when maintenance mode is enabled.
ManageEventsActivity
Organizer-focused event management screen showing approved, pending, and rejected items in one place.
MemoriesActivity
Displays the current user's saved memories.
Memory
Memory.java Model class representing a post-event memory saved by a user.
MemoryAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for attendee memories.
MockAuthRepository
 
MockPaymentService
MockPaymentService.java A demo service that simulates a payment process.
MyEventsFragment
MyEventsFragment.java Displays personal events based on user role.
NavigationTransitions
Shared navigation motion for internal fragment changes.
Notification
Notification.java Model class representing a user notification message.
NotificationAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for in-app notifications.
NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
 
NotificationCenterActivity
Activity that displays in-app notifications stored in Firestore.
OrganizerEventDetailActivity
OrganizerEventDetailActivity.java Organizer-facing event management screen showing registration counts and actions.
OrganizerPendingAdapter
OrganizerPendingAdapter.java Adapter for showing organizer pending proposals using the same event card layout but hiding heart/share and showing a PENDING badge.
OrganizerPendingAdapter.OnPendingClickListener
 
OrganizerPendingAdapter.PendingViewHolder
 
OrganizerProposalDetailActivity
Read-only organizer view for pending and rejected event proposals.
Payment
Payment.java Model class representing a payment record in Firestore.
PaymentRepository
PaymentRepository.java Repository class for handling payment-related Firestore operations.
ProfileFragment
ProfileFragment.java Profile and settings screen.
QRCodeHelper
QRCodeHelper.java Utility class to generate QR code Bitmaps.
Rsvp
Rsvp.java Model class representing an RSVP document in Firestore.
ScannerActivity
ScannerActivity.java Allows organizers to scan attendee QR codes and mark them as attended.
SearchFragment
SearchFragment.java Firestore-backed event search screen with text debounce and category filters.
SignInActivity
SignInActivity.java Screen for returning users to sign in.
SignUpActivity
SignUpActivity.java Screen for new users to register an account.
SignupValidator
 
SplashActivity
SplashActivity.java Simple splash screen shown when the app launches.
ThemeManager
Stores and applies the app's light/dark preference locally.
TicketActivity
TicketActivity.java Activity for displaying the generated QR code ticket to the attendee.
TicketTierAdapter
TicketTierAdapter.java Adapter for displaying selectable ticket tiers and quantity counters.
TicketTierAdapter.OnTotalChangedListener
 
TicketTierAdapter.TicketTier
 
TicketTierAdapter.TierViewHolder
 
User
User.java Model class representing a user document from the Firestore users collection.
UserRoles
Shared helpers for role-based access decisions.
WelcomeActivity
WelcomeActivity.java Entry screen for new and returning users to choose between Sign In and Sign Up.
WhoIsComingActivity
WhoIsComingActivity.java Screen for organizers to view attendees, mark them as attended via QR scanner or manual code entry, and blacklist attendees.
